2143880.name: Red Haven
2143880.description:
Overview: In Red Haven, there are mysteries and secrets that have been locked away! In this horror game, the player can investigate the complex and discover what's inside or maybe who. There are multiple levels filled with jump scares, puzzles, and patterns that the player will have to follow if they want to survive! The player will also have to be stealthy and know when to hide from enemies within the complex. Feedback is much appreciated and if you enjoy it share it with friends!

NOTE: This is an unfinished game so I acknowledge there is some bugs with it. Bugs are mainly on some of the monsters but I wanted to give people a chance to play the game who wanted to so I released this version. Also the game is suppose to be very challenging, I did not want it to be easy on purpose!
2143880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
